mapper.select: SELECT item_seq AS itemSeq, item_name AS itemName, entp_name AS entpName, ingr_name AS ingrName, item_image AS itemImage, efcy_qesitm AS efcyQesitm, use_method_qesitm AS useMethodQesitm, atpn_warn_qesitm AS atpnWarnQesitm, atpn_qesitm AS atpnQesitm, intrc_qesitm AS intrcQesitm, se_qesitm AS seQesitm, deposit_method_qesitm AS depositMethodQesitm, drug_shape AS drugShape, color_class1 AS colorClass1, print_front AS printFront FROM drug_info WHERE item_seq = #{itemSeq}

SELECT item_seq AS itemSeq, item_name AS itemName, entp_name AS entpName, ingr_name AS ingrName, item_image AS itemImage, efcy_qesitm AS efcyQesitm, use_method_qesitm AS useMethodQesitm, atpn_warn_qesitm AS atpnWarnQesitm, drug_shape AS drugShape, color_class1 AS colorClass1, print_front AS printFront FROM drug_info WHERE item_seq IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drug_info ( item_seq, item_name, entp_name, ingr_name, item_image, efcy_qesitm, use_method_qesitm, atpn_warn_qesitm, atpn_qesitm, intrc_qesitm, se_qesitm, deposit_method_qesitm, drug_shape, color_class1, print_front ) VALUES ( #{itemSeq}, #{itemName}, #{entpName}, #{ingrName}, #{itemImage}, #{efcyQesitm}, #{useMethodQesitm}, #{atpnWarnQesitm}, #{atpnQesitm}, #{intrcQesitm}, #{seQesitm}, #{depositMethodQesitm}, #{drugShape}, #{colorClass1}, #{printFront} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE item_name = VALUES(item_name), entp_name = VALUES(entp_name), ingr_name = VALUES(ingr_name), item_image = VALUES(item_image), efcy_qesitm = VALUES(efcy_qesitm), use_method_qesitm = VALUES(use_method_qesitm), atpn_warn_qesitm = VALUES(atpn_warn_qesitm), atpn_qesitm = VALUES(atpn_qesitm), intrc_qesitm = VALUES(intrc_qesitm), se_qesitm = VALUES(se_qesitm), deposit_method_qesitm = VALUES(deposit_method_qesitm), drug_shape = VALUES(drug_shape), color_class1 = VALUES(color_class1), print_front = VALUES(print_front);
